name: src
description: Interact with Sourcegraph from the command line

options.description: Limit the number of results that are displayed. Only supported together with stream flag. Statistics continue to report all results
Log GraphQL requests and responses to stdout
Explain the JSON output schema and exit
Print the curl command for executing this query and exit. (WARNING: Includes printing your access token!)
Skip validation of TLD certificates against trusted chains
Whether or not to output results as JSON
Pipe output to `less -R` (only if stdout is terminal, and not json flag)
Consume results as stream. Streaming search only supports a subset of flags and parameters: trace, insecure-skip-verify, display, json
Log the trace ID for requests
Include the operating system and architecture in the User-Agent sent with requests to Sourcegraph
Print the curl command for executing this query and exit (WARNING: includes printing your access token!)
Log GraphQL requests and responses to stdout
Skip validation of TLS certificates against trusted chains
GraphQL query to execute, e.g. ‘query { currentUser { username } }’ (stdin otherwise)
Log the trace ID for requests
Include the operating system and architecture in the User-Agent sent with requests to Sourcegraph
GraphQL query variables to include as JSON string, e.g. ‘{“var”: “val”, “var2”: “val2”}’

subcommands.name: login
subcommands.description: 'src login' helps you authenticate 'src' to access a Sourcegraph instance with your user credentials

subcommands.description: Edit or view external service configuration on the Sourcegraph instance

subcommands.name: serve-git
subcommands.description: By default 'src serve-git' will recursively serve your current directory on the address ':3434'

options.description: Address on which to server (end with : for unused port)

subcommands.description: Create, edit, view, tag, or delete users

subcommands.name: validate
subcommands.description: EXPERIMENTAL: Instance validation provides a quick way to check that a Sourcegraph instance functions properly after a fresh install or an update
